Banner Stand Orders ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Banner Stands with Premium 36" x 72" Vinyl Banners for Indoor & Outdoor Display ## Durable Vinyl & Fabric Banner Stand Materials with Professional Hardware - Customize & Order Your Display Solution PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: Select vinyl or fabric banner material for your display stand Product Configuration: Complete banner stand with professional hardware included Quantity Selection: Choose quantity for your custom banner stand order Size Options: Premium 72" x 36" display dimensions available Template Selection: Choose from professional templates or upload custom artwork Design Options: Template customization, file upload, or professional design service PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Vinyl Banner Stand Material for Professional Indoor & Outdoor Display

The Versatile Banner Stand provides excellent stability, easy adjustment and is capable of holding two different banners to create a double sided display. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick. Dowels are included.

The printed banners will have a 2" pole pocket on the top and bottom. Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom. Price includes the Banner Stand and a 36" x 72" Full-Color Printed Banner.

This professional display solution is perfect for trade shows, retail environments, offices, and outdoor promotional events. The versatile design accommodates both vinyl and fabric banner materials, providing flexibility for various indoor and outdoor applications.

Key features include professional-grade hardware, easy assembly without tools, compact storage design, and compatibility with multiple banner materials. The stand's adjustable components ensure secure banner positioning for professional presentation in any environment.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Material Selection for Durable Display Solutions

13 oz Vinyl Banner Material

Our high quality 13 oz vinyl banner material is the standard material we use for banner stands. It is rated for both indoor and outdoor use. You can select to have either (1) 13 oz vinyl banner or (2) 13 oz vinyl banners printed for the stand.

This durable vinyl material provides excellent weather resistance, vibrant color reproduction, and long-lasting display performance for professional applications.

Banner Soft Fabric Material

Our Banner Soft material is our fabric option for banner stands. The material offers a matte finish with vibrant print colors. The edges of the fabric will be cut with a hot knife to prevent fraying when rolled in and out of the retractor. We recommend you be very careful when retracting the banner as some fraying may still happen.

You can select to have either (1) fabric banner or (2) fabric banners printed for the stand.

Click here to request a sample packet of materials

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing Options for Professional Display Installation

All banners include professional 2" pole pockets on top and bottom for secure mounting in the versatile banner stand hardware. The pole pocket construction ensures smooth installation and removal while maintaining banner tension for optimal display appearance.

Pole Pocket Specifications

Standard 2" pole pockets are included on all banner stand orders. Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges to ensure visibility after installation.

Double-Sided Display Options

The versatile stand hardware accommodates two banners simultaneously for double-sided display capabilities. This feature is ideal for trade shows, retail environments, and high-traffic areas where visibility from multiple angles is important.

Hardware Specifications

Professional-grade aluminum construction with adjustable components. The stand breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. All necessary dowels and hardware are included with your order.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

2 Business Days Express Production

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete

3 Business Days Standard Production

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Most popular production timeline
  • Ideal balance of speed and value
  • Standard processing for most banner stand orders

5 Business Days Saver Production

If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Cost-effective option for non-urgent orders
  • Same high-quality production standards
  • Ideal for planned display campaigns
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Payment & Processing Options

All orders must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept multiple payment methods to accommodate your business needs.

Accepted Payment Methods

  • Visa, MasterCard, American Express and Discover cards
  • Business checks (must be received before production begins)
  • Purchase orders (contact customer service for options)

Payment Processing

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your proof for your order. This ensures you have complete control over your banner stand design before payment is processed.

For check orders, checks must be received and cleared before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see our blog.

If you have a purchase order, please contact a customer service representative at (320) 391-5300 for your payment options and processing requirements.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Banner Stand Delivery

This Product is made in our Minnesota Facility ONLY.

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering.

Available Shipping Methods

  • Economy (5-10 Business Days)
  • Standard (3-5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped. Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package.

Special Shipping Considerations

Due to UPS shipping restrictions, additional shipping charges may apply to large orders and over-sized packages. If you are located outside of the Continental United States, please contact us for a shipping quote.

International Shipping Requirements

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

Economy Shipping Notes

If choosing economy shipping please add in additional postal information such as P.O. Box in the "Address Two" field on the checkout page to help ensure delivery. Economy shipping can add an additional 5 - 10 days, depending on destination.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Display Applications for Banner Stand Systems

Trade Show & Exhibition Displays

Perfect for trade show booths, exhibition halls, and professional presentations. The portable design and double-sided capability make these banner stands ideal for maximizing visibility in high-traffic exhibition environments.

Retail & Storefront Advertising

Excellent for retail promotions, seasonal campaigns, and storefront advertising. The weather-resistant materials support both indoor showroom displays and outdoor sidewalk advertising applications.

Office & Corporate Environments

Professional appearance suitable for corporate lobbies, conference rooms, and office presentations. The adjustable design accommodates various ceiling heights and space configurations.

Event & Promotional Marketing

Versatile display solution for promotional events, grand openings, and marketing campaigns. Easy setup and breakdown make these stands perfect for temporary installations and traveling promotional teams.

Educational & Institutional Use

Suitable for schools, libraries, hospitals, and government facilities. The professional hardware and durable materials provide long-term display solutions for institutional environments.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

File Format Requirements

Vector-based .eps files with fonts converted to outlines provide the best results. We can also print high resolution .pdf, .tif, and .jpg formats. If you don't have access to or are unsure if you have a high-resolution file, our professional graphic designers will be happy to assist with this.

Design Safety Areas

Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges. This ensures your content remains visible after pole pocket installation and maintains professional appearance when mounted in the banner stand hardware.

Resolution Requirements

Typically 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best for banner stand printing. This ensures crisp text and vibrant image reproduction for professional display quality.

Order Proof Options

If you are looking to be able to give your order one last look and make sure all the information and images are correct, requesting an order proof will allow you that benefit. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order including pricing, and your billing and shipping information.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we highly recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details please contact our team at (320) 391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Custom Banner Stand Display Today

Ready to create a professional display solution for your business or event? Our banner stand systems offer the perfect combination of portability, durability, and professional appearance for any display application.

Three Easy Ways to Start Your Order

Pick a Template to Customize

Choose from our extensive library of professional templates and customize with your own text, images, and branding. Our online design tool makes it easy to create professional displays in minutes.

Upload Your Print-Ready File

Have your own artwork ready? Simply upload your high-resolution file and we'll handle the rest. Click here to visit our artwork specifications page for detailed file requirements.

Professional Design Service

Our team of graphic designers can create a custom banner stand display for you. Upload any artwork you want included and provide instructions - we'll design a professional display that meets your exact specifications.

Why Choose Our Banner Stand Solutions?

  • Customer Service: Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers
  • Fast Turnaround: Choose between 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production times to complete your order on your schedule
  • Quality Materials: Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology
  • Live Order Tracking: Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system

Questions about your banner stand order? Call us at (320) 391-5300 and one of our customer service representatives would be happy to help design the perfect display solution for your needs.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions - Banner Stand Orders

What materials can I choose for my banner stand?

We offer two premium material options: 13 oz vinyl for maximum durability and weather resistance, or Banner Soft fabric for a professional matte finish with vibrant colors. Both materials are suitable for the versatile banner stand hardware.

How do I ensure my artwork prints correctly on the banner stand?

Keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges to account for the 2" pole pockets. Submit high-resolution files (300 dpi or higher) in .eps, .pdf, .tif, or .jpg formats for best results.

Can the banner stand hold two banners at once?

Yes, the versatile banner stand is designed to accommodate two different banners simultaneously, creating a double-sided display perfect for trade shows and high-traffic areas.

What's included with my banner stand order?

Your order includes the complete banner stand hardware, professional dowels for installation, and your custom-printed 36" x 72" banner with pole pockets. Everything needed for immediate setup and display.

How quickly can my banner stand be produced?

We offer flexible production times from 2 to 5 business days. Choose Express (2 days), Standard (3 days), or Saver (5 days) based on your timeline and budget requirements.

Is the banner stand suitable for outdoor use?

Yes, when paired with our 13 oz vinyl material, the banner stand system is rated for both indoor and outdoor applications. The durable materials and professional hardware provide excellent weather resistance.

How portable is the banner stand for events?

The stand breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. This makes it ideal for trade shows, traveling displays, and events requiring frequent setup and breakdown.

What if I need help with my banner stand design?

Our in-house team of professional graphic designers can assist with artwork creation, file preparation, or design consultation. Contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 for design assistance.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
